<!-- mykb-curator spec_hash=spec-abc123 kb_commit=kb-def456 generated_at=2026-05-15T08:30:00Z -->

== Overview ==

Vault is the centralised secrets manager.

== Resource Groups ==

<!-- CURATOR:BEGIN block=rg-table zone=machine provenance=h1 -->
data

<!-- CURATOR:END block=rg-table -->
== Topology ==

<pre>
graph TD; A--&gt;B;
</pre>

== Notes ==

<blockquote>
'''Note:''' Auto-unseal uses Azure Key Vault.
</blockquote>

<!-- mykb-curator footer run-id=run-1 kb-commit=kb-def456 last-curated=2026-05-15T08:30:00Z -->
